message.content:

Failing test: "premium of 197.5G rounds UP to 198G (in MHPCO's favor)"
Expected: { premium: 198 } (round up from 197.5)
Current error: Expected 198, received 197.5
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Note: Wrap the final premium computation in Math.ceil to round up (in MHPCO's favor).

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll implement the minimal change to make this test pass by wrapping the premium computation in Math.ceil.

input.old_string: return { premium: basePremium - totalDiscounts + firstInsuranceSurcharges + PROCESSING_FEE };
input.new_string: return { premium: Math.ceil(basePremium - totalDiscounts + firstInsuranceSurcharges + PROCESSING_FEE) };
